generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab#"
namespace base = "http://example.org/base#"

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor providing real-time operational data to the DT through Hono/Ditto middleware",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor providing real-time operational data to the DT through Hono/Ditto middleware",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor providing real-time operational data to the DT through Hono/Ditto middleware",
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission
]

instance PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from physical building systems transmitted via Eclipse Hono to DT for processing and analysis, enabling continuous synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Integrated sensor data from physical building systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control parameters for building systems",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalToVirtualDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, BuildingPerformanceSimulation
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for BIM-based transformations",
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentFramework, BuildingPerformanceSimulation
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM model enriched with runtime semantics for devices and control logic, including geometric, spatial, and functional data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools, EclipseDitto
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentFramework : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment framework automating BIM semantics extraction and runtime interface generation, validated through ODTE metric with standardized extension points",
    DTDFVocab:provides BIMSemanticsExtractionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy optimization using BOREALIS",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionReductionRecommendation
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulation : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5",

]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting control within Building Control Systems"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC systems within Building Control Systems"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReductionRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for system adjustments to reduce energy consumption based on predictive analytics"
]

instance OperationalStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status insights for building monitoring"
]

instance PerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from building performance simulations for operational decisions"
]

instance VisualRepresentationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of building data for interactive analysis"
]

instance BIMSemanticsExtractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from BIM semantics extraction for deployment framework validation and extension"
]

instance BuildingSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure within AECO domain represented as a unified virtual model for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator, BuildingBIMModel
]

instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure within AECO domain represented as a unified virtual model for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingSystemEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT's services (e.g., optimization algorithms) sent through Ditto to BCS actuators for physical adjustments, such as adjusting lighting levels or HVAC settings."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange between physical and virtual components, maintaining live operational status for immediate decision-making."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular, service-oriented architecture where BIM models act as the semantic foundation, integrated with Hono/Ditto middleware for bidirectional data exchange and Unreal Engine for interactive visualization, enabling scalable DT services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle from design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with BIM serving as the semantic backbone for all stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness, verifying the alignment between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware facilitating real-time data exchange between physical assets and the DT, utilizing IoT protocols for sensor and actuator communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards (e.g., IFC) for semantic modeling, and integration with standardized middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for interoperable data exchange protocols."
]
